title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, founding mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans cannot win a race to match AI's knowledge, but that curiosity, judgment, and creative insight (exemplified by Ramanujan) remain distinctly human strengths. He advocates for recognizing undervalued talent and redefining what intelligence means as AI systems advance.
